## Entities.IConfectionJournalRecord.entries property

Optional detailed journal entries recording what actually happened. When present, provides a complete audit trail of the production session.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly entries?: ReadonlyArray<IConfectionJournalEntry>;
```
